name: python3-aiohttp-jinja2
title: python3-aiohttp-jinja2
description:
jinja2 template renderer for aiohttp.web
aiohttp_jinja2 library makes it easier to integrate Jinja2 (template engine for
Python) templates in aiohttp.web (asyncio HTTP server)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiohttp-jinja2 because jinja2 template renderer for aiohttp.web.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiohttp-jinja2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiohttp-jinja2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiohttp-jinja2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
